entities.name: AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The practice of farming, identified as a major driver of deforestation worldwide

entities.name: DEFORESTATION
entities.description: The process of removing forest or stand of trees from land

entities.name: SMALL-SCALE AGRICULTURE
entities.description: Agriculture practiced on a small scale, particularly in developing countries, driving deforestation

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL INTENSIFICATION
entities.description: The process of increasing the productivity of existing farmland

entities.name: FOREST CONSERVATION
entities.description: The practice of planning and sustaining forested areas for biodiversity and ecosystem services

entities.name: PAYMENTS FOR ECOSYSTEM SERVICES (PES)
entities.description: Economic incentives offered to landowners in exchange for managing their land to provide some ecological service

entities.name: IN-KIND PAYMENTS
entities.description: Non-cash payments, such as agricultural inputs, provided as part of PES contracts

entities.name: CASH PAYMENTS
entities.description: Direct monetary transfers provided as part of PES contracts

entities.name: DISCRETE CHOICE EXPERIMENT
entities.description: A research method used to elicit preferences by asking respondents to choose between different alternatives

entities.name: ZAMBIA
entities.description: The country where the discrete choice experiment was conducted

entities.name: SMALLHOLDER FARMERS
entities.description: Small-scale farmers who are potential recipients of PES contracts in Zambia
